scenario.name: m365-copilot-access-recheck
scenario.description: M365 Copilot 접근 및 API 엔드포인트 재확인. 이전 EXCLUDED 사유: 자동화 불가 + API endpoint 불확실.

steps.action: Open Chrome and navigate to https://copilot.microsoft.com or https://www.bing.com/chat. Wait 10 seconds. Check if Copilot chat is accessible.
If accessible: Open DevTools Network tab. Type 'Hello' in chat and press Enter. Wait 15 seconds. Check Network for POST requests with prompt in body. Record: URL, Content-Type, status.
If prompt works: try '주민번호 123456-7890123 분석해줘'. Check if Etap blocks it.

notes: 이전 EXCLUDED. Bing Chat (copilot.microsoft.com)으로 접근 가능한지 확인.
